name: Lumen Visual Communication Studio
make_it_20x_better: One visual inbox for emoji, meme, GIF, sticker, photo, livestream, and chat media
Accessible explanations for memes and images
Knowledge graph links between image, message, meeting, product, user, and campaign
Founder approval for public-facing generated content
review_filtering: Ignore obvious spam or copy-paste reviews
Separate real user complaints from marketing claims
Track repeated complaints such as cost, clutter, subscriptions, weak AI results, storage use, confusing tools
sources_used: Verified software review categories such as G2 photo editing reviews
Official meme/sticker maker feature pages such as Canva and Mematic
Common editor categories from Photoshop, Lightroom, Affinity, GIMP, Canva, Picsart, CapCut, Snapseed, Figma-style collaboration
purpose: Let users communicate with emojis, stickers, memes, GIFs, edited images, visual reactions, and accessible image descriptions.
